task_completion.description: Log into NOSH ChartingSystem as the administrator.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The NOSH ChartingSystem dashboard or main interface is visible, indicating a successful login (often showing 'admin' or an administrator profile).

task_completion.description: Navigate to the section for managing billing, service, or CPT codes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A page or modal for adding/editing billing codes, service codes, or CPT codes is open.
The text 'SPT-PHY' is typed into the 'Code' input field.
The text 'Sports Physical Exam' is typed into the 'Description' or 'Code Text' input field.
The value '50.00' or '50' is typed into the 'Fee', 'Charge', or 'Price' input field.

task_completion.description: Mark the billing code as active.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An 'Active' checkbox is checked, or a status dropdown is set to 'Active'.

task_completion.description: Save the new custom billing code.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message indicating the code was saved, or the new code 'SPT-PHY' is visible in the list/table of existing billing codes.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the NOSH ChartingSystem web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the NOSH application, not a terminal executing database queries or API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply type the target values into a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The inputs for code, description, and fee are entered into the actual form fields within the NOSH web application, not a notepad or text editor.

integrity.description: The results appear in the genuine NOSH ChartingSystem.
integrity.visual_evidence: The UI matches a medical charting system's billing/coding section, rather than a generic or unrelated webpage.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Code: 'SPT-PHY'. Target Description: 'Sports Physical Exam'. Target Fee: 50.00. The code must be marked as active in the system.
